---
title: "Getting started"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{Getting started}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>",
  eval = FALSE
)
```

```{r setup}
library(quone)
```

## Install the compiler

```{r}
quone::install_compiler()
quone::compiler_version()
```

## Compile a script

```{r}
writeLines("main <- 1 + 1", "demo.Q")
quone::build("demo.Q")
quone::run("demo.Q", rscript = TRUE)
```

## Build a multi-module project

```{r}
quone::create_project("demo")
setwd("demo")
quone::create_module("Stats.Summary")
quone::add_dependency("dplyr", ">= 1.1")
quone::document()
```

## Live development

```{r}
quone::dev_session()
```

This builds and reloads the package on every `.Q` change; runtime
errors in the live session are rewritten back to `.Q` source via
`with_sourcemap()`.
